meaning: adj.神志昏迷的,不省人事的,发狂的
examples: He became delirious and couldn't recognize people.
The crowds were delirious with joy.
She's delirious, but has lucid intervals.
At the nip of daybreak, I walked out onto the back porch barefoot and delirious.
For now, South Koreans seem content to run with the delirious optimism and excitement of the moment.
